summary:
Adam and Brad discussed several business topics spanning AnswerAI finances, client updates, pricing models, and developer tooling. A significant portion focused on the SBI Builder prospect — Brad re-sent a revised proposal with $25K upfront (down from half), waiving the license fee for Phase 1, totaling $125K fixed bid over 3 gates. Pedro had relayed that SBI had PTSD from a prior $60K failed software engagement. Brad also proposed an outcome-based/usage pricing model for services — charging per specific task (e.g., per domain research, per ticket analyzed) rather than generalized chatbot per-message fees, creating recurring revenue with lower client risk.

Client updates covered Diligent (larger than UW Health in scope, lots of Sanity components/objects, 4-6 weeks remaining on 12 prepaid dev weeks, ~$100K expected incoming on 60-day terms), IAS (invoices pending for January, multiple active tracks including PDF work, PRC bot, search results, and intranet), and WOW (at risk due to acquisition and zero-line budgeting). Brad expressed frustration with Max's pace on deliverables, particularly the IAS deployment delay. They discussed setting up payments for Max and Diego out of AnswerAI.

Brad demonstrated the Alpha Agent Team plugin ecosystem for Claude Code, walking Adam through installing the JIRA marketplace plugin, creating a retro skill/agent, and contributing PRs to the Alpha Agent repo. Adam successfully installed the Atlassian MCP, created a JIRA ticket, and built a new retro command skill. They discussed standardizing team tooling around these plugins for cohesion and productivity.
keyDiscussionPoints: SBI Builder proposal revised to $25K upfront, $125K total Phase 1 fixed bid, license fee waived
Outcome-based/usage pricing model proposed — charge per specific task (domain research, ticket analysis) vs. generalized chatbot
Credits-based pricing system discussed for simplicity and predictability
Diligent project larger than UW Health, 4-6 weeks remaining, ~$100K expected revenue
IAS has multiple active workstreams (PDF, PRC bot, search, intranet) at $15K/month
WOW contract at risk due to acquisition — $17K/month high-margin contract
AnswerAI runway less than 1 month, burn rate ~$20-25K/month
Brad frustrated with Max's delivery pace, considering keeping only one person if AAI winds down
Alpha Agent Team plugins demonstrated for Claude Code — JIRA, Linear, retros
Need to set up payment for Max and Diego from AnswerAI accounts
decisions: Revised SBI proposal sent with $25K upfront and waived license fee for Phase 1
Moving away from generalized chatbot/FlowWise toward focused Answer Engine use cases
Adam to set up payments for Max and Diego
Alpha Agent Team plugins to be standardized across the team

actionItems.action: Set up payment for Max from AnswerAI
Set up payment/bank account for Diego
Talk to Abby (Diligent) about more budget/SOWs
Prepare IAS deck/outline with Krista for Brad's meeting
Install and use Alpha Agent Team plugins
Create PR for retro skill in Alpha Agent repo

followUp: SBI Builder response — Pedro following up, need answer by end of week
Check if Diligent payments have started coming in (60-day terms)
WOW renewal status — contract up end of March/April
IAS next project from Chris's team
